TimesheetFiller.Cli 1.2.0
Copyright (C) 2026 TimesheetFiller.Cli

  -i, --input    Required. The input path of the config

  --offset       The number of days to offset from today. For example, if you
                 set this to 1, then it will run for yesterday and today.

  --dry-run      Determines if this is is run in dry run

  --help         Display this help screen.

  --version      Display version information.
